MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem: Henry Shain, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge, Clerk: Marta Vallejo,
Appearances:
Katrina Arcieri, Plaintiff present in pro per
Nancy Elana Galante, Defendant present in pro per.
Case did not settle, Trial date is confirmed.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nancy Elana Galante and Kenneth E. Martin appearing in propria persona 643-2231, opposing the motion

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- PLAINTIFF
KATRINA ARCIERI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT-- DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS
RE BREACH OF WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY. Defendant is to prepare an order. (PHA/301/SL) REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220

Nancy Elana Glanate appearing in propria persona 643-2231, demurring party
Katrina Arcieri appearing in propria persona 756-4478, opposing party

RULING:
Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendants Nancy Galante and Kenneth Martin's DEMURRER to AMENDED COMPLAINT -- Overruled. Defendant has 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR To Strike Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nancy Elana Glanate appearing in propria persona 643-2231, moving to strike amended complaint
Katrina Arcieri appearing in propria persona 756-4478, opposing party

Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendants Nancy Galante and Kenneth Martin's Motion
